nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles, pregnant, obese, scene cuts,

Make sure to adjust the number of tiles and overlap to fit your hardware.
(fewer tiles will result in faster execution, but will require more memory)
Do explore various samplers and cfg values (although we advise them to be kept close to 1)

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: TTGL A young woman with shoulder-length retro bob blue hair tied with red ribbon accents walks down a stone staircase towards the viewer in a town a black cat curiously follows her down the steps. She wears a light yellow sundress and a straw hat that tips shifts from the wind, prompting her to quickly lift one hand to pull off the hat and hold it with one hand and toss it aside. As she moves, her sundress ripples and flaps in the wind, and she instinctively moves her other hand down to press the fabric down as it blows her dress hem. She turns her head slightly with blushing cheeks, letting out a soft, melodic giggle. She says in a bright, cheerful voice: “This wind is killer!” A small black cat follows closely behind her on the steps with its tail wagging back and forth. Butterflies flutter around while flowers sway heavily at the edges of the frame and leaves blow past the foreground. The camera follows her in a smooth medium tracking shot with a subtle upward tilt, capturing the shifting shadows of foliage dancing on the ground. The audio is perfectly synchronized, capturing the rustle of the leaves, the soft thud of her footsteps on the stone, the cat's meow, and her clear, happy speech. Upbeat fun synth music is playing. animation
